query:
SELECT f.situacao, COUNT(*) as total
FROM febraban f
LEFT JOIN consignados c ON TRIM(f.proposta) = TRIM(c.nrOperacao)
WHERE c.nrOperacao IS NULL
GROUP BY f.situacao
ORDER BY total DESC;
